name: awesomeweldoneskills
description: Weldone 焊接团队 Agent Skills marketplace

skills.name: add-diag-logs

skills.name: add-diag-instrumentation

skills.description: 以减法为先的代码审查：识别过度设计、冗余代码、命名晦涩、注释失衡

skills.name: superpowers
skills.description: 完整的 agent 开发方法论技能集：头脑风暴→计划→TDD→调试→审查→交付，共 14 个模块
skills.author: superpowers (obra)

skills.name: archive
skills.description: 多入口查询项目知识库：关键词搜索、领域浏览、术语查询、Records 时间线检索
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: archive-import
skills.description: 导入外部文档到项目知识库，支持 records 模式（格式转换）和 knowledge 模式（深度整理）
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: archive-session
skills.description: 会话归档：收集变更、生成 record、检测可复用知识并按领域路由写入知识库
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: knowledge-reorg
skills.description: 知识库领域级重组：健康检查、合并/拆分/移动领域、合并碎片文件
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: diagnosing-bugs
skills.description: 纪律化诊断循环：复现→最小化→假设→埋点→修复→回归
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: grill-me
skills.description: 针对计划或设计的 relentless 追问，逐个分支理解决策树
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: grill-with-docs
skills.description: 针对计划的 relentless 追问，过程中内联生成 ADR 和术语表
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: handoff
skills.description: 将当前会话压缩为交接文档，供下一个 agent 接续工作
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: improve-codebase-architecture
skills.description: 扫描代码库寻找深化机会，生成可视化 HTML 报告，再逐个 grill 落实
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: periodic-review
skills.description: 生成月度/年度项目回顾，按领域追踪知识演进和健康度
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: prototype
skills.description: 构建一次性原型验证设计：终端应用（逻辑/状态）或 UI 变体切换
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: setup-matt-pocock-skills
skills.description: 配置工程 skills 的 issue tracker、triage 标签词表和领域文档布局
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: tdd
skills.description: 测试驱动开发：红-绿-重构循环，垂直切片 tracer bullet 工作流
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: to-prd
skills.description: 从当前会话上下文生成 PRD 并发布到项目 issue tracker
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: ask-matt
skills.description: 路由器：询问当前场景适合哪种 skill 或流程
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: codebase-design
skills.description: 深模块设计共享词汇表，辅助接口设计、深化机会与可测试性决策
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: domain-modeling
skills.description: 构建和打磨项目领域模型，统一领域术语并记录架构决策
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: grilling
skills.description: 计划/设计压力测试追问，匹配 grill 触发词
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: implement
skills.description: 基于 PRD 或一组 issue 实现一项工作
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: teach
skills.description: 在工作区内向用户教授新技能或概念
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: to-issues
skills.description: 将计划/spec/PRD 拆解为可独立认领的 issue（垂直切片 tracer bullet）
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: triage
skills.description: 将 issue 和外部 PR 推过 triage 状态机：分类、验证、必要时 grill，产出 agent 就绪简报
skills.author: Matt Pocock

skills.name: writing-great-skills
skills.description: skill 写作参考：让 skill 可预测的词汇与原则
skills.author: Matt Pocock
